issues.description: Missing condition to check if Leader has {GERMA 66} type. DSL requires: LeaderHasType condition with type:'GERMA 66'
Action should support playing from trash as well as hand. Current DSL only includes PlayFromHand; card text says 'from your hand or trash'. Need to handle both sources or use appropriate action type.

Missing prerequisite action: trashing this Character is a cost ('You may trash this Character'). Should include ForceDiscard action targeting self as part of activation cost logic, or clarify in condition that this is optional.
Filter uses 'maxCost':7 but card text says 'with a cost of 7', implying exact cost. Should clarify if this is ≤7 or =7.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [Activate: Main] DON!! −1: You may trash this Character. If your Leader has the {GERMA 66} type, play up to 1 [Vinsmoke Ichiji] with a cost of 7 from your hand or trash.
